title: Vangviang Heat Wave
lead: Vangviang is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.51. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vangviang is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, and the wind speed is 3.9 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
